payload.notes: Order ORD-1887 found for Hannah. Delivered item (Linen Midi Dress - Sage M) reported as damaged. Negative sentiment.

payload.rationale: Delivered item reported as damaged and customer explicitly requested a refund, which aligns with policy for damaged delivered items.

payload.english: Dear Hannah, we are truly sorry to hear that your Linen Midi Dress - Sage M from order ORD-1887 arrived damaged. We understand how disappointing this is. As requested, we have approved a full refund of RM 129.00, which will be processed to your original payment method within a few business days. Thank you for your patience.
payload.bahasa_malaysia: Kehadapan Hannah, kami sangat dukacita mendengar bahawa Linen Midi Dress - Sage M dari pesanan ORD-1887 anda tiba dalam keadaan rosak. Kami faham pasti anda kecewa. Seperti yang diminta, kami telah meluluskan bayaran balik penuh sebanyak RM 129.00, yang akan diproses ke kaedah pembayaran asal anda dalam beberapa hari bekerja. Terima kasih atas kesabaran anda.

payload.supervisor_note: Automated refund for damaged item aligns with policy. High confidence, no escalation needed.

payload.notes: Order found for Aina; status SHIPPED, delivery date pending. Intake had missing customer name and unknown issue type.

payload.rationale: Complaint contains no specific issue or complaint, only a greeting. Issue type is unknown and requires manual review to determine the customer's needs.

payload.english: Hi there, we could not confidently resolve this automatically. We have escalated your case to our support team for review.
payload.bahasa_malaysia: Hai, kami tidak dapat menyelesaikan isu ini secara automatik dengan yakin. Kes anda telah diserahkan kepada pasukan sokongan untuk semakan.

payload.supervisor_note: Customer message contained only a greeting with no specific issue. Manual review needed to clarify the customer's needs.

payload.notes: Order found for Aina. Status: SHIPPED with no delivery date. Customer complaining of delivery delay with negative sentiment.

payload.rationale: Order has been shipped for two weeks with no tracking movement and no delivery date, indicating it is lost in transit. Customer explicitly requested a refund if not resolved today.

payload.english: Hi Aina, we are sorry that Baju Kurung Moden - Maroon XL arrived damaged. We have approved a refund MYR 89.00 to your original payment method. Please allow a few business days for it to appear.
payload.bahasa_malaysia: Hai Aina, kami mohon maaf kerana Baju Kurung Moden - Maroon XL tiba dalam keadaan rosak. Kami telah meluluskan bayaran balik MYR 89.00 ke kaedah pembayaran asal anda. Sila berikan beberapa hari bekerja untuk ia dipaparkan.

payload.supervisor_note: Fallback supervisor logic used because structured LLM output was unavailable.

payload.notes: Order found for Aina. Status is SHIPPED with no delivery date. Customer reported a delivery delay with negative sentiment.

payload.rationale: The issue can likely be resolved by arranging a replacement or delivery follow-up.

payload.english: Hi Aina, we are sorry for the issue with Baju Kurung Moden - Maroon XL. We will arrange a replacement or delivery follow-up and update you shortly.
payload.bahasa_malaysia: Hai Aina, kami mohon maaf atas isu berkaitan Baju Kurung Moden - Maroon XL. Kami akan mengatur penggantian atau semakan penghantaran dan mengemas kini anda tidak lama lagi.

payload.supervisor_note: Approve automated reship. Elevated to high priority due to negative sentiment and missing delivery date.

payload.notes: Order found for Aisyah. Status: DELIVERED. Issue: damaged_item.

payload.rationale: Order was delivered and the item arrived broken, which aligns with policy to refund clearly damaged delivered items.
